\tzpentry{ID4472}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4472 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\mathcal{B}_M = \nabla \times \left( \mathcal{M}_{\mu\nu} \cdot u^\nu \right) \cdot \chi_T \equiv \mathbf{\Omega}_{LT} \cdot \exp\left( \frac{\Phi_{\text{TZP}}}{P_T} \right)$$
